meta_desc: Inflatable tents for events: X, N, V and spider tents. Quick assembly, customizable, windproof. Manufacturer since 1992.
photo_alt: An 'Hallucine' inflatable tent and inflatable furniture set up outdoors on a lawn
hero_desc: Discover our complete range of inflatables for events. X, N, V and spider tents, customizable arches and inflatable furniture. All our structures use sealed-tube technology for fast, blower-free assembly.
c1_desc: X-shaped inflatable tents. Unique design, quick set-up, full customization. Available from 3m to 8m.
c2_desc: Inflatable N-shaped tents. Sturdy, elegant structure for professional events. Several sizes available.
c3_desc: V-shaped inflatable tents. Elegance and practicality combined for your outdoor events.
c4_desc: Inflatable spider tents with inflatable feet for exceptional stability. From 4m to 10m in diameter.
c5_desc: Customizable inflatable arches from 4m to 12m wide. Waterproof - just one inflation. Ideal for sporting and promotional events.
c6_desc: Inflatable sofas, armchairs, bars and counters. Waterproof technology, elegant design, customization possible.
av1_desc: Sealed air chamber - just one inflation, no permanent blower.
av2_desc: Assembly in just a few minutes by 1-2 people, without special tools.
av3_desc: Logo printing, choice of colors, custom sizes.
av4_desc: High-quality materials tested to last. After-sales service and spare parts.
cta_desc: Contact us for personalized advice. We'll help you choose the structure best suited to your event.
